title: Crunchy Italian Cheese Fritters
description: A crispy and cheesy Italian-inspired snack filled with crunchy texture.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine Italian breadcrumbs, crumbly parmesan cheese, and grated mozzarella cheese.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together beaten eggs and milk.
3. Add the egg mixture to the breadcrumb mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Stir in salt and chopped parsley.
5. Add crunchy chopped onion and mix until evenly distributed.
6. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Note: Fritters can be served with marinara sauce or a side of mixed greens salad.
